metadata.title: KLASSCI — School management, reimagined.
metadata.description: KLASSCI digitises school operations end-to-end. Grades, schedules, payments, report cards — one tool, zero paperwork.
metadata.keywords: school management, school software, KLASSCI, grades, report cards, timetable, payments, attendance, education SaaS, Côte d'Ivoire, Africa

hero.title: School management, reimagined.
hero.subtitle: KLASSCI replaces your spreadsheets, grade books, and bulletin boards. One place to run everything.

items.title: Simple
items.description: Built for secretaries, teachers, and principals who don't have time to learn complex software. Trial account in 2-3 days, full deployment in 2 weeks.

items.title: Complete
items.description: Grades, report cards, schedules, payments, attendance, enrolments — everything is integrated. Zero extra tools.

items.title: Secure
items.description: Each school runs on its own isolated database. Your data is never shared with other schools.

features.title: What KLASSCI does for you
features.intro: Every feature was built by listening to the real needs of the schools we've supported since 2023.

big.title: Grade entry & report cards
big.description: Teachers enter grades directly from their phones. Averages, ranks, and comments are computed automatically. PDF report cards are generated in one click, branded with your school colours.
big.alt: Grade entry and report cards — KLASSCI student record

big.title: Real-time financial tracking
big.description: See each student's payment status instantly. Send automatic reminders, generate receipts, and export financial reports. Compatible with category-based fee systems.

big.title: Master timetable
big.description: Configure teaching hours for each programme/level combination. Track planned vs delivered hours with a clean admin dashboard.

big.title: Attendance management
big.description: Comprehensive dashboard for student attendance. Teachers run a digital roll-call or admin staff mark presences. Real-time rates, trends, and exportable reports.

big.title: Full LMD system
big.description: Manages units, course modules, credits, and semesters in line with UEMOA standards. Adapted report cards, automatic credit validation, and full student pathway tracking.

big.title: Staff management
big.description: Unified administration of coordinators, teachers, secretaries, and accountants. Overview with role/status filters and fast search.

small.title: Online enrolments
small.description: End-to-end workflow: from application to validation, with document and required-paperwork tracking.

small.title: Role-based dashboards
small.description: Principal, secretary, teacher, accountant, coordinator — each one sees only what concerns them.

small.title: API & integrations
small.description: Connect KLASSCI to your LMS or existing system through our documented REST API.

notes.title: Grade entry & report cards
notes.intro: KLASSCI turns grade management into a fast, simple process. No more shared spreadsheets and entry errors.
bullets: Online entry from phone, tablet, or computer
Automatic averages, ranks, and comments
PDF report cards branded with your school colours
Coefficients, credits, and class-level subject management
Full grade history per student and per term
Bulk export for printing or archiving
notes.outro: Teachers enter grades directly — secretaries no longer re-key them. Report card production drops from 3 weeks to 48 hours.

finance.title: Real-time financial tracking
finance.intro: The KLASSCI accounting module delivers a clear, instant view of your school's financial health.
bullets: Dashboard with live KPIs: revenue, receivables, collection rate
Per-student payment tracking with full history
Automatic email reminders with customisable templates
Generate payment receipts and PDF financial statements
Financial reports by period, class, or fee category
Flexible fee system: enrolment, tuition, exams, and more
finance.outro: Accountants see at a glance who has paid and who needs reminding, and can act immediately — no waiting for month-end.

planning.title: Master timetable
planning.intro: The master timetable lets you configure and track teaching hours across the school.
bullets: Hour-volume configuration per programme/level pairing
Track planned vs delivered hours
KPIs: number of sessions, teaching hours, active teachers
Overview, year planner, class load, and coordinator interface
Subject-level hour volume per programme and level

presences.title: Attendance management
presences.intro: Track student attendance with a clean dashboard and simple tools.
bullets: Digital roll-call by teacher or admin marking
Dashboard with KPIs: present, absent, late, excused
Live attendance rate by class and by student
7-day trends and per-class attendance
Reports and CSV/PDF export
Detailed statistics and full history

lmd.title: Full LMD system
lmd.intro: KLASSCI supports the LMD system (Bachelor-Master-Doctorate) compliant with UEMOA standards.
bullets: Units, modules, and credits managed by semester
Student pathway with progressive credit validation
LMD report cards with weighted averages and credits
Configurable calculation formulas (AQ, NAQ, APC)
Mix classic vocational programmes and LMD in the same school

personnel.title: Staff management
personnel.intro: Unified administration of every member of your school's staff.
bullets: Overview: coordinators, teachers, secretaries, and accountants
Per-role KPIs with live counters
Per-category tabs with search and filters (status, payroll ID)
Fast onboarding of new staff with direct assignment
Detailed profiles with contact details, hire date, and status

socialProof.title: Trusted by schools educating thousands of students

testimonials.quote: Before KLASSCI, grade entry took 3 weeks. Today, report cards are ready in 48 hours. Teachers enter grades directly online.
testimonials.highlight: report cards are ready in 48 hours
testimonials.author: Dr. Soro Kouadio

testimonials.quote: Financial tracking has completely changed for us. We see in real time who has paid, who needs a reminder, and the reports are always up to date. We no longer wait until month-end to get a clear picture. It has become indispensable.
testimonials.highlight: Financial tracking has completely changed for us.
testimonials.author: Ama Bamba

testimonials.quote: Digital sign-in cut absenteeism by 30%. Coordinators see in real time who is present, without waiting for paper sign-in sheets.
testimonials.author: Tarek Mehdy

video.title: They say it better than we do
video.description: Hear from a school administrator who uses KLASSCI every day to manage students, teachers, and finances.

security.title: Total security and trust
security.p1: We guarantee the highest level of data protection in strict compliance with GDPR. Our dedicated cybersecurity team works continuously to strengthen our defences.
security.p2: Each school runs on its own isolated database — no data is ever shared between schools.

support.title: Customer support, available 24/7
support.p1: Get reliable answers any time through our built-in chatbot. Talk directly to our team via email, WhatsApp, or Telegram.
support.p2: Our agents handle French and English fluently. Average response time: under 2 minutes.
support.alt: KLASSCI customer support — chat and assistance

pricing.title: One offering, three service tiers
pricing.subtitle: Every module, every new feature. What changes between tiers is the human service level — engineering days, support, account manager.

elite.name: Élite
elite.tagline: The complete suite, with no constraints.
elite.fineprint: 6M FCFA first year · 460k FCFA / month on monthly billing

common.title: Included in every plan
items: Every business module: grades, report cards, attendance, schedule, enrollments, accounting, LMD UEMOA
common.highlight: Every new product feature ships to all tiers.

partner.name: Partner Plan (Formule Partenaire)
partner.description: 500k FCFA installation + 15k FCFA / student / year, paid through parent tuition. Zero working capital required from the school.

comparison.subtitle: Detail of the three service tiers

rows.label: Admin seats (Founder, Director, Studies, Bursar, Cashier)

pricing.footer: Every tier includes hosting, backups and MESRS compliance · Migration of your existing data included at activation

items.a: Each school runs on its own isolated database. Data is encrypted in transit and at rest. No school can access another school's data.

items.q: Can I migrate my data from Excel?
items.a: Yes. KLASSCI offers import tools for student lists, classes, and subjects in Excel format. Our team can also assist with the initial migration.

items.q: Does KLASSCI support the LMD system?
items.a: Yes. KLASSCI supports both classic vocational programmes and the LMD system (Bachelor-Master-Doctorate) with units, modules, credits, and semesters compliant with UEMOA standards.

items.q: How long until we're up and running?
items.a: On the free plan (3-month trial), your account is created in 2 to 3 days. On a paid plan, expect about 2 weeks for full customisation and deployment.
Yes. The interface is fully responsive and works on smartphones, tablets, and desktops. Teachers can record attendance and grades directly from their phones.

items.q: Can I try KLASSCI for free?
items.a: The Free plan lets you test KLASSCI for 3 months with up to 50 students. Your account is ready in 2 to 3 days. On a paid plan, expect about 2 weeks for full customisation and deployment.

contact.title: Request a demonstration
contact.intro: Have questions or want to see KLASSCI in action? Fill in the form and our team will get back to you within 24 hours.

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Tell us how KLASSCI can help you...

success.title: Message sent
success.text: We will get back to you within 24 hours.

error.title: Sending failed
error.text: Something went wrong. Please retry, or email contact@klassci.com.

letter.title: Ready to simplify your school's operations?
letter.text: We built KLASSCI because African schools deserve modern, simple, and reliable tools. Try it — it's free.

footer.tagline: School management platform built for higher-education institutions in Africa.
